# terrible_community_general_gitlab_group_access_token (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `expires_at` (String) Expiration date of the access token in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. Make sure to quote this value in YAML to ensure it is kept as a string and not interpreted as a YAML date.
- `group` (String) ID or full path of group in the form of group/subgroup.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Access token's name.
- `scopes` (String) Scope of the access token. The values `read_virtual_registry`, `write_virtual_registry`, `manage_runner`, and `self_rotate` were added in community.general 11.3.0.

### Optional

- `access_level` (String) Access level of the access token. The value `planner` was added in community.general 11.3.0.
- `recreate` (String) Whether the access token is recreated if it already exists. When `never` the token is never recreated. When `always` the token is always recreated. When `state_change` the token is recreated if there is a difference between desired state and actual state.
- `state` (String) When `present` the access token is added to the group if it does not exist. When `absent` it is removed from the group if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `access_token` (String) API object. Only contains the value of the token if the token was created or recreated.
